items.title: Russia Hikes June Subsidies to Refiners as Fuel Shortages Bite
items.description: Russia’s subsidy payouts to oil refiners that supply domestic markets jumped more than six-fold in June from a year earlier, as Moscow sought to avoid shortages by keeping more fuel at home.

items.description: Money managers in Europe won’t have to report ESG data on all the assets they hold, under revised disclosure requirements.
